decrementing and referencing a variable in a complex condition can cause unintended side-effects due to C++'s order of evaluation, consider moving the modification outside of the condition to avoid misunderstandings

implicit conversion loses integer precision: 'long' to 'UCHAR' (aka 'unsigned char')
